---
title: '2014.01.05 Journal Sunday'
date: '2014-01-05T14:57:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6421362628212555105'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/20140105-journal-sunday.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

Feeling: Nervous about marriage session today. Not sure what to expect. Hopeful that it will be productive because Gateway has been exceeding my expectations as a Church from day one and I've really come to respect Bob Hamp.<br />
<br />
Thankful: For Jesus. This week with Flavia has been my best week in our 10 yrs. My kids are healthy and smart and creative. Thankful for the van passing inspection, that was a miracle.<br />
<br />
Kids: I should support Flavia better because it's been mostly her raising them right and me staying out of the way.<br />
<br />
Me: I identify myself as lazy and fat and laugh about it. This is keeping me lazy and fat. Must reframe my inner image.
